case_title: SAMERA EDWARDS VS. ARLENE KEEL et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO THE JUDICIAL OFFICER FOR APPROVAL.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF MAY-01-2012
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY EDWARDS, SAMERA KEEL, ARLENE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, SAMERA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE BANKS, LISA $702.99 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $752.99, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT BECAUSE DEFENDANT DID NOT TIMELY COMPLY WITH CAL.CIV.CODE 1950.5. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT ACT IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE HEARING SET FOR JAN-19-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,025.00 FILED BY EDWARDS, SAMERA AS TO DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE BANKS, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, SAMERA AS TO DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE BANKS, LISA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED SEP-24-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SC-112A PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL. FORM SC-221, RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, SAMERA AS TO DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE BANKS, LISA
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, SAMERA PETITION MAILED ON MAY 19, 2011
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED SEP-23-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, LISA
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS ON JUDGMENT (SC-220); FILED BY DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY ARLENE KEEL IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $50.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING FEBRUARY 1, 2011 UNTIL APRIL 1, 2012, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT OF $52.99. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL.
ORDER ON PETITION TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR IS APPROVED. SIGNED BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
